summary: 3 LOGIN_REQUIRED services tested: baidu ACCESSIBLE+BLOCKED, character.ai ACCESSIBLE+NOT_BLOCKED(WebSocket), poe ACCESSIBLE+BLOCKED(site crash)

findings.apf_method: SSE stream injection with {id: 'apf-blocked', object: 'chat.completion'} containing warning text
findings.ui_behavior: Chat shows no visible error or warning text. APF injection visible only in DevTools console/network.
findings.warning_text_in_stream: ⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. 개인정보(주민등록번호, 전화번호 등)를 AI 서비스에 입력하지 마세요.

findings.apf_bypass_reason: Chat delivered entirely via WebSocket — APF's HTTP-based domain matching cannot intercept WebSocket frames
findings.response_summary: Character 'Рип' responded normally in Russian roleplay context
findings.console_events: create_chat, create_and_generate_turn, WS Message Received, add_turn, FirstChunkLatency, streaming completed

findings.login_method: Google account session (장희 최) — profile setup dialog appeared on first visit
findings.apf_method: ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR on both gql_POST and receive_POST endpoints
findings.error_message: 오류 — 예기치 않은 오류가 발생했습니다. 페이지를 다시 로드해 주세요.
findings.console_errors: 35 errors: net::ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR (multiple), FetchAPI Failed to fetch, TypeError: Failed to fetch at fetchQuery/fetchQueryJSON
findings.note: APF blocks Poe's entire API infrastructure (both GraphQL and SSE), causing complete site crash. No chat possible.

key_insights.websocket_bypass: character.ai uses WebSocket (wss://neo.character.ai/ws/) for chat delivery, completely bypassing HTTP-based APF. Same pattern as m365_copilot (#443).
key_insights.baidu_warning_gap: Baidu/ERNIE APF injection works at protocol level but warning text doesn't render in UI — same as #443 qianwen finding.
key_insights.poe_total_block: Poe's HTTP-based API (GraphQL + SSE on poe.com domain) is fully blocked by APF, but this causes site crash rather than graceful warning.
key_insights.login_summary: baidu: no login needed | character.ai: no login needed (anonymous) | poe: login required (Google account)
